name: HWR_RCMNDTN_VL
query: SELECT B.RECOMMENDATION_ID , B.SOURCE_ID , B.RECOMMENDATION_TEXT , B.RECOMMENDATION_TYPE , B.RECOMMENDER_ID , B.RECOMMENDER_URI , X.PRFL_ID , B.CREATED_BY , B.CREATION_DATE , B.LAST_UPDATED_BY , B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE , B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_RCMNDTN_B B LEFT JOIN HWR_RCMNDTN_PRFL_X X ON (B.RECOMMENDATION_ID = X.RECOMMENDATION_ID AND B.SOURCE_ID = X.SOURCE_ID)
